title: Cresh: A Star Wars UI Overhaul
description: Cresh is a lightly detailed and sleek UI overhaul inspired by Star Wars.
body:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/A76a1TiN/images/9921e095fad92a83d6ac99b611e6cfeec30bc52e.png)

**Cresh is a simple and unique UI overhaul inspired by Star Wars. Lightly detailed and sleek, it should suit any vanilla or modded playthrough.**

Recommended for use with [Galaxies: Parzi's Star Wars Mod!](https://modrinth.com/mod/pswg)
